title: The Killing of al-Zubayr b. al-'Awwam
description: According to al-Sari (in writing)-Shu'ayb-Sayf-al-Walid b. `Abdallah-his father: When Talhah and al-Zubayr's army was routed on the Day of the Camel, al-Zubayr left. He passed the army of al-Ahnaf, who, when he saw him and was told who he was, remarked: "By Allah! He's been forced to do this"1025 and

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
